h1.visual_description: Not visible on this specific page; likely reserved for top-level chapter titles in a similar red sans-serif style.

h2.visual_description: Medium-large, red, sans-serif font, left-aligned; used for primary section headings or guiding questions.
h2.example_text: What tool(s) do you typically use in your course?

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption label, bolded and followed by descriptive text in a smaller, dark grey sans-serif font.
Hyperlink to internal chapters or external resources.
Page footer containing the page number and the current section title in red uppercase text.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom margin contains a page number and section title separated by a vertical pipe (e.g., '164 | SUPPORTING OER ADOPTION').
